name: Patient
history: In a relationship with Ivan for about seven years and married for three. Stressful periods during academic finals and wedding preparation due to lack of support from Ivan. Current financial pressure involving Ivan's part-time work, therapy costs, and dental treatment expenses.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I need to be perfect to be accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: I can't handle things on my own.
coping_strategies: Avoidance and procrastination of tasks due to fear of failure.
situation: Partner neglects responsibilities such as contributing to expenses and completing administrative tasks.
auto_thought: I can't do anything right, and it's all my fault.
behavior: Avoidance of tasks and responsibilities, leading to clutter and unfinished projects.
